# Testing

This is a navigation alias for an existing project adopted into Product Factory OS. Do not duplicate verification evidence here.

## Canonical Sources

- Project-local command reference: `AGENTS.md`
- Verification contract: `.pfo/VERIFICATION_CONTRACT.json`
- Golden flows: `.pfo/GOLDEN_FLOWS.md`
- Permission matrix: `.pfo/PERMISSION_MATRIX.md`
- Reloadable state: `.codex-memory/STATE.json`

## Rule

Update verification evidence and state first. Keep this file as a short index only.
